findings: Large orchestration surfaces remain in `src/shared/components/MediaLightbox/ImageLightbox.tsx`, `src/shared/components/MediaLightbox/hooks/useSharedLightboxState.ts`, `src/shared/components/MediaGallery/index.tsx`, and `src/tools/edit-images/hooks/useInlineEditState.ts`, indicating partial decomposition but still high behavioral concentration.

Migration debt is explicit and active: `src/types/shots.ts` is deprecated with a dated sunset contract, `src/shared/lib/tasks/travelBetweenImages/legacyStructureVideo.ts` is a compatibility shim, and `src/shared/lib/preloading/types.ts` + `src/shared/lib/preloading/index.ts` preserve legacy aliases/fields.

Initialization and global coupling persist in Supabase setup (`src/integrations/supabase/client.ts`) through eager singleton creation plus `window` global registration/instrumentation side effects at import time.

Domain typing is improving (`src/types/generationAndShots.ts` canonical barrel, helper normalization in `src/shared/lib/mediaTypeHelpers.ts`) but mixed import paths and compatibility layers reduce coherence.

Dependency graph pressure is notable in lightbox/editing flows due to many cross-cutting hooks/contexts, while low-level function hygiene is generally solid (clear naming, guarded logic, explicit validation in `src/shared/lib/tasks/imageGeneration.ts`, and bounded cache management in `src/shared/lib/preloading/tracker.ts`).
